title: Change Log
content: {"time":1784480506713,"blocks":[{"id":"gp-OdC9jiT","type":"header","data":{"text":"Change Log","level":2},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"M7_E7ruWvu","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"All notable changes to SonaCMS are documented here."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"a6uro3It_E","type":"header","data":{"text":"[1.4] — 20 July 2026","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"zD-uLdJVKx","type":"header","data":{"text":"Added","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"5-oPvr_Ysb","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Photo galleries A new Gallery block holds multiple images in one block, shown as a tidy, responsive grid on the frontend. In the editor you can add several images at once, give each an optional caption, reorder them, and remove them individually."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"Cqg62naHOm","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Gallery-aware lightbox Clicking any gallery image opens a full-screen lightbox with previous/next navigation through that gallery — by clicking the arrows or using the keyboard (left/right to move, Escape to close). Captions display beneath each image. Standalone lightbox images (from the regular image block) continue to work as before, now with caption support too. The lightbox remains vanilla JavaScript with no external library."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"65zUlJk1uu","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Optional publish date Pages now have a "Show publish date on the page" checkbox beneath the Date field. When enabled, the date displays in a readable long format (e.g. "20 July 2026") wrapped in a semantic <time> element for SEO — ideal for blog posts and news. Off by default, so ordinary pages stay clean."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"acEgNqSYBx","type":"header","data":{"text":"Changed","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"1ZaU_oyOXG","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"The frontend lightbox script (/js/lightbox.js) has been upgraded to support gallery navigation. If you're upgrading, replace this file.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"index.php now calls a renderPublishDate() helper above the content. It outputs nothing unless a page opts in, and developers can move the call anywhere in the template.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"LnEVIsZyWk","type":"header","data":{"text":"Upgrade notes","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"URv6jiQWNN","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"If you're upgrading from 1.3:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"MLeVa_XG71","type":"list","data":{"style":"ordered","meta":{"counterType":"numeric"},"items":[{"content":"Replace js/lightbox.js (now gallery-aware).","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Replace index.php, and the files in SonaCMS/app/ and SonaCMS/vendor/ (the new gallery tool is SonaCMS/vendor/gallery-tool.js).","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Replace your frontend css/styles.css (adds gallery, upgraded lightbox, and publish-date styles) and the admin SonaCMS/app/css/styles.css.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Your customisations in /inc/, /css/, /forms/ and config.php are untouched by upgrades — as always.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"dEoLKXZKw5","type":"header","data":{"text":"[1.3] — 19 July 2026","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"rRGC65rjfB","type":"header","data":{"text":"Added","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"2VvFrFbCrg","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Hero banners Pages now have optional Hero Image, Hero Title, and Hero Subtitle fields. When a hero image is set, it renders as a full-width banner at the top of the page with the title and subtitle overlaid. Leave the image blank and the page displays as before, with no banner. The banner is fully responsive and, like everything on the frontend, styled with plain CSS you can restyle freely (.site-hero)."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"7wBxz73lDl","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Clickable and lightbox images The image block now offers a per-image choice: a plain image, a clickable link (opens a URL you specify), or a lightbox (clicking the image enlarges it in a full-screen overlay on the frontend). The lightbox is vanilla JavaScript with no external library."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"Rrw7Z0vZJJ","type":"header","data":{"text":"Changed","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"fj1hV1nKVM","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"The image block is now a self-hosted tool rather than a third-party CDN package — one less external dependency. Existing images are unaffected and continue to display normally.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"The frontend lightbox script now lives in its own file at /js/lightbox.js.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"index.php is tidier: the SEO <head> tags and hero banner are now generated by helper functions (renderPageHead() and renderHero()), leaving the page template cleaner and easier to customise.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"r_iPMWIk_x","type":"header","data":{"text":"Upgrade notes","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"ECWvT0XgB-","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"If you're upgrading from 1.1:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"jsk413CoWq","type":"list","data":{"style":"ordered","meta":{"counterType":"numeric"},"items":[{"content":"Create a /js/ folder in your web root and upload js/lightbox.js.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Replace index.php, and the files in SonaCMS/app/ and SonaCMS/vendor/ (the image tool is now SonaCMS/vendor/image-tool.js).","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Replace your frontend css/styles.css (adds hero and lightbox styles) and the admin SonaCMS/app/css/styles.css.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Your customisations in /inc/, /css/, /forms/ and config.php are untouched by upgrades — as always.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"hkhEHlc_om","type":"header","data":{"text":"[1.1] — 11 July 2026","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"1wg4dW0JHc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Added"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"88amOGE8gB","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Automatic XML sitemap "},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"KqmIdF3lSf","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"SonaCMS now generates an SEO sitemap dynamically from your published pages, served at /sitemap.xml. It builds hierarchical URLs from your page tree, excludes drafts automatically, and includes <lastmod> dates — so it stays accurate with no manual maintenance. Submit it to Google Search Console and forget about it."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"WhksIMg4Ls","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Canonical URLs"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"fxX-tUp4pS","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Every page now outputs a <link rel="canonical"> tag built from a new site_url config value. This tells search engines which domain owns your content, even if the site is reachable through another domain pointing at the same server — preventing duplicate-content issues and making sure your real domain gets the credit. Open Graph image URLs and the sitemap use the same canonical base."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"xiHjEMoPOc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Code block in the editor"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"G_q8fraCz0","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A new Code block for the page editor, with an optional language label. Preserves indentation and whitespace exactly, escapes content safely, and renders inside <pre><code> on the frontend. Built for documentation and tutorial pages."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"GyetjUsbYz","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"robots.txt"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"pPbUPzUnje","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Ships with a sensible default: allows crawling of public pages, blocks the admin and internal directories, and points crawlers at the sitemap."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"hahxrthvld","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Changed"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"wChlO0eDM5","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":".htaccess now includes a rewrite rule serving /sitemap.xml from the sitemap generator."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"P87_MQocpr","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Font stacks no longer lead with Helvetica. On some Linux systems Helvetica is aliased to a font with mismapped glyphs, which could render editor menu labels as garbled text. Stacks now start with Arial, which resolves correctly everywhere."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"wtHoVJPHUn","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Upgrade notes"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"i1awyw1YpZ","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"If you're upgrading from 1.0:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"fJfH6ediu4","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Add site_url to SonaCMS/config.php — your site's canonical address, with no trailing slash. For example: 'site_url' => 'https://www.yoursite.com',"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"rYDeobCed4","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Upload the new sitemap.php and robots.txt to your web root."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"LgfYvbhDJa","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Add the sitemap rewrite rule to your .htaccess, above the existing RewriteCond lines:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"d46VouC14h","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"RewriteRule ^sitemap\.xml$ sitemap.php [L]"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"l1jpp5wCK2","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Replace index.php, and the files in SonaCMS/app/ and SonaCMS/vendor/."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"wqrpvcyoED","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Your customisations in /inc/, /css/, /forms/ and config.php are untouched by upgrades — as always."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"VPQbKGAfwX","type":"header","data":{"text":"[1.0] — 9 July 2026","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"x-vwqbu2G7","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Initial public release."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"MozqRsrZi2","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A flat-file CMS with no database. Content is stored as JSON files, so there's nothing to install, nothing to back up, and nothing to pay for month after month."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"BG5Mz6v5bh","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Content management"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"IzKe0UTCgt","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Block-based page editor built on Editor.js","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Hierarchical pages with parent/child nesting and clean URLs","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Page ordering and show/hide control for navigation menus","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Draft and published states","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Reusable author tiles, managed separately and inserted anywhere","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"eA3dOhhYO_","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Editor blocks"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"L7cvZv729K","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Text, headings, lists, quotes, images, video embeds, buttons, multi-column layouts, forms, and author tiles — plus inline emoji and text alignment.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"hMwCYEDFZ5","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Forms"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"MLDXgYOS06","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Drop any PHP form file into /forms/ and it appears in the editor automatically."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"L0JK9fIs4_","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A generic handler emails submissions to you, with honeypot spam protection and automatic switching between PHP mail() and SMTP (e.g. SMTP2GO)."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"sRe1X1FMmI","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"SEO and sharing"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"Wswg9f_j_U","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Per-page meta descriptions and keywords, plus per-page social share images for link previews on X, Facebook, LinkedIn and elsewhere."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"gaAm8kbE0n","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Built to be restyled"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"CqG0ZeJVtG","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"The frontend ships deliberately unstyled. Everything a developer touches — navigation, footer, 404 page, form handling, and all CSS — lives outside the CMS core and survives upgrades."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}}],"version":"2.31.6"}
